Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: paintings by location or context [300033619], paintings (visual works) [300033618], visual works by material or technique [300191091], visual works (works) [300191086], Visual Works (hierarchy name) [300179869], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Painted decorations or scenes that dominate a wall (or ceiling) surface. For works in other media that dominate a wall (or ceiling), use the more general term "murals (any medium)".

Úsese para decoración o escenas pintadas que dominan la superficie de un muro (o cielo raso). Para obras en otros medios que dominan un muro (o cielo raso), use el término más general "mural (cualquier medio)".
Schilderingen die een groot deel van een muur- of plafondoppervlak bedekken. Gebruik 'wandversieringen' voor werken in andere media die grote delen van muren danwel plafonds bedekken.

Gemalte Dekoration oder Szene, die die Oberfläche einer Wand (oder einer Decke) beherrscht. Für Werke in anderen Medien, die eine Wand oder Decke beherrschen, siehe den allgemeineren Begriff ["Wandgestaltung"](300182732).

Decorações pintadas ou cenas que dominam a superfície de uma parede (ou teto). Para trabalhos em outras mídias que dominam uma parede (ou teto), use o termo mais geral "murais (qualquer meio)". Decorações pintadas ou cenas que dominam a superfície de uma parede (ou teto). Para trabalhos em outras mídias que dominam uma parede (ou teto), use o termo mais geral "murais (qualquer meio)

Term_Source.Page: 264, re Byzantine - also uses wall paintings

Source.Source_ID: 2000046691/Lucie-Smith, Thames & Hudson Dictionary of Art Terms (1986)

Term_Source.Page: Any ptgs made directly on the wall or fastened perm'ly to it.
lg. ptgs in any medium made for a particular wall, whether ptd directly on it or affixed to it.; murals

Source.Source_ID: 2000001231/Mayer, Artist's Handbook of Materials and Techniques (1981)
2000026701/Mayer, Dictionary of Art Terms and Techniques (1969)

Term_Source.Page: Francis V. O'Connor - 8/90 "images on wall which artic. w. delib. intent what goes on in the space;" murals

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)

Term_Source.Page: mural paintings executed by any of various techs.

Source.Source_ID: 2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
2000051218/Alvarez et al., Diccionario de la decoración (1968)
2000051218/Alvarez et al., Diccionario de la decoración (1968)
2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
